summary: Classified the PR inventory shard using the hydrated preflight artifact as live state. No shared canonical was invented. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix PR action is planned; one security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling and the already-closed PR is kept closed.

actions.reason: Open independent feature PR; keep for maintainer review rather than dedupe or close.
